{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322065740904C35940FD43E23A018"}"},"total":410},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7553665545013543704","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这书在海贼王同人里算是数一数二的，不光是章节多，整体故事线叙述目标明确，作者思维清晰不混乱，没有刻意去水字数，没看过原作动画也不至于看不懂，唯一个人感觉就是龙宫剧情可以省，因为整体看下来并没有什么意义，算是整个篇幅中可有可无的那种，多了这些章节对于看过动漫的来说就是介绍了古代兵器，对于没看过的来说就算没有，完全不影响整体的流畅程度，另外希望粉丝们再推荐部好的海贼作品，当然章节得多，否则真不过瘾，隔壁的那个什么建立海贼家族就算了，我幼儿园文化都不爱看[笑][笑][笑]","text_exts":[{"e":6,"s":3,"text":"海贼王","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%B5%B7%E8%B4%BC%E7%8E%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741338603E23A018%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227553665545013543704%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227233650591732337676%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%B5%B7%E8%B4%BC%E7%8E%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1758727848,"group_id":"7233650591732337676","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7h0WUqFFHKdR1Wb5jLiN5g=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"800044068122955","user_name":"爱吃吐司的墨染离"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"800044068122955","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7233650591732337676","book_info":{"abstract":"【全员幻兽种】+【大剑豪】+【多果实能力】
